Executive Summary:
• 	The new way to do business is to deliver value first. It needs to be part of your business
DNA.
• 	The first thing you’ll learn and accomplish with PLF is how to launch, and then you learn
how to do it over and over again.
• 	After that you’ll learn how to build these lessons into your blog posts, products, emails,
etc. There’s now more transparency, trust, and relationship building present in successful
businesses. 10-15 years ago we didn’t have this, but it’s required now.
• 	When you do your launch the spotlight will be focused on you, your business, and your
product. PLF aligns your product with what people want and how our brains actually
work - this will set you up for success.
• 	You may already be an expert, or may not want to be one at all…both ways work.
• 	Here’s one example: John Gallagher started simply by creating an educational board
game for kids about how to use plants as medicine. He began with a tiny newsletter list
and sold just 12 games. After PLF, and a proper product launch, he sold 670 games. Now
he’s sold 50,000 games, and that’s just the tip of the iceberg!
• 	Since then he’s developed online courses, expanded the membership site, and he’s not a
guru. His role is having expertise in marketing for his niche, and he’s built up a great
business now.
• 	Here’s another example: Susan Garrett teaches dog agility training, a tiny little niche and
competitive sport. She had a goal to pay off the cost of PLF before the credit card bill came
in, and she did. First she came out with an e-book, and now she’s established herself as
the #1 guru within her market.
• 	Another example: It’s my own story. When I first started in the stock market niche, I had
zero expertise or credentials. I was simply the front-man for the operation, but had
someone in the background with the expertise. Then with PLF, I started with a simple
Seed Launch and have worked my way up to now even being a New York Times #1
bestselling author.
• 	So there's lots of different paths through Product Launch Formula. It's all about doing the
one launch and getting better. Launch stacking. The results stacking where you just keep
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
on getting better and better and better. Taking baby steps and moving forward.
• 	PLF gives you the ability to create an amazing promotion and products at will. It also
shows you how to influence people, how to get them to take action and how to become
more attractive to your audience. Once you get there, business becomes much easier.
• 	Your goals might be to make money, or to save the world. Most PLF Owners start by just
wanting to grow their business, but eventually they grow as people.
• 	The entrepreneur’s hierarchy of needs typically begins by wanting to make money, then
it’s about “I need some time”, then it becomes about your relationships, and finally
working towards a higher purpose.
• 	You can have all of these needs met if you take PLF, learn it, embody it, and run with it.
• 	Leave a comment on this video and let me know, where are you in your journey? Or just
say “I’m here Jeff, and I’m ready!”.

One day he came home and designed a board game. It was about edible and

roll out that first.
He had a small newsletter list that he built with borrowed Wi-Fi and he had a

board game to them and he sold 12 games. Then he got Product Launch
Formula, put together a proper launch and sold 670 games. So from 12
to 670 is pretty amazing. Now he's sold 50,000 games.
That was just the tip of the iceberg because then he sold a physical product. It

He's got the marketing skills and he brings them to the market. He's not the

On the other hand, there's Susan Garrett. Susan Garrett teaches about dog

around you. They want to be part of your world. It makes you more charismatic,

Once you have those things, you can have anything you want. The business
side becomes really easy. For me, business is really easy now. It's not hard. It's not
hard for me to make sales. It's not hard for me to grow my business. It's not hard for
me to attract an amazing team. When you become attractive, all those things become
really, really powerful.
Now the thing is, you can just make money, or you can save the
world. You can make a huge impact on the world. Most of my PLF owners,
they start off just wanting to make money, but they evolve towards a greater sense of
purpose. There's this “entrepreneur's hierarchy of needs.” You've probably heard of
“Maslow's hierarchy of needs,” this is similar.
I've been thinking about this for a long time. My business coach Dan Sullivan
has helped me think about this as well. When you start out, it's usually about money
only. Then, for some people there's a turnaround. It usually starts off; you just want
to make some money. You just have to pay some bills, build a lifestyle, support your
family.
Then when you got that money part taken care of, then it's about “I need
some time.” Sometimes it's flipped around. People come in, they've already got
money, they just need some time. Sometimes these flip around, but basic value of
time and money.
Freedom of money, freedom from want, freedom from time to do what you
want. Then when you get up in here, when you get your time and money figured out,
then it becomes relationship. Who are you with? Who are you working with? Who are
your clients? Who do you get to help? Who do you get to serve?
For me, one big thing is that we don't suffer from bad clients. We
fire clients. If we have a client and they're not treating my support staff
the way I want them to, we'll say thanks and here's your money back
and have a great life. We just don't deal with people like that. There’s just some
people in the world that are hard to work with and we don't deal with them. I suggest
you do the same thing. There's nothing more empowering than firing clients. If you
don't know that yet, you will learn it soon.
After you get the money and the time figured out, then it's about relationship.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
